title: X-teroids
description:
|||||||||| Developer's Note ||||||||||

I've always learned to make games by making games, and love making small, solid arcade games with simple mechanics. Expect 'X-teroids' to be a small, replayable arcade high-scoring game whose sole goal is to survive the game for 10 minutes while accumulating scores and unlocking a few extra skins.

I appreciate the feedback and will do everything I can to ensure support for my game. If you experience problems with the game, please leave a review on the store page, or if you just want to say hello, please contact me via email.

Thank you for taking the time to read this article; I really hope you enjoy playing my game.

liangxie - Team SunnyTech

|||||||||| GAMEPLAY ||||||||||

"X-teroids" improves upon the original "Asteroids" game by adding features tailored to modern players. With just a mouse or joystick directional buttons, players can freely control their spaceship, but of course, skillful operation requires practice.

|||||||||| Feature ||||||||||

In addition, several unique props can constitute emergent experiences. 

 

Break your own records by consistently setting new personal bests. 

Compete with your friends on the friend leaderboard.

Find your place on the global leaderboard.

In addition to the black and white theme, two themes are also supported

English and chinese language supported
description_short: Look back on the classic arcade games of the 80s. X-teroids is a retro-style, addictive, and fast-paced arcade shooter game.
